items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 4 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「OpenAI CEO Altman is now "pretty sure" AI is net job-creating, which is quite the pivot from predicting mass layoffs」、「Grades dropped from 96 to 48 percent when a Brown professor made students take the exam without AI」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：OpenAI CEO Altman is now "pretty sure" AI is net job-creating, which is quite the pivot from predicting mass layoffs
评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：Grades dropped from 96 to 48 percent when a Brown professor made students take the exam without AI
评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：AI agents win at Slay the Spire 2 after researchers replace growing chat logs with structured memory
watchItems: 跟进：OpenAI CEO Altman is now "pretty sure" AI is net job-creating, which is quite the pivot from predicting mass layoffs
跟进：Grades dropped from 96 to 48 percent when a Brown professor made students take the exam without AI
跟进：AI agents win at Slay the Spire 2 after researchers replace growing chat logs with structured memory
跟进：How to Evaluate General-Purpose Robot Policies for Real-World Deployment

items.title: OpenAI CEO Altman is now "pretty sure" AI is net job-creating, which is quite the pivot from predicting mass layoffs
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：OpenAI CEO Sam Altman now says he's "pretty sure" AI has created more jobs than it's eliminated. That's a sharp turn from his earlier warnings about entire professions disappearing. Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is walking…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: Grades dropped from 96 to 48 percent when a Brown professor made students take the exam without AI
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：An economics professor at Brown University suspects most of his 86 students used AI to cheat on a take-home exam that averaged 96 percent. When he made the final an in-person test, 18 students dropped the course, nine d…
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: How to Evaluate General-Purpose Robot Policies for Real-World Deployment
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：Robotics foundation models have made remarkable progress. Today's best systems can follow natural language instructions to pick, place, sort, and manipulate a...

items.title: AI agents win at Slay the Spire 2 after researchers replace growing chat logs with structured memory
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：The AgenticSTS project replaces the ever-growing chat log of AI agents with five separate memory layers. Tested on the card game Slay the Spire 2, the prompt stays at around 5,000 tokens instead of ballooning past 500,0…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。
